innateAbility.name: Equilibrium
innateAbility.description: Grants a greater outgoing damage amplification the closer Io is to full health.

abilities.name: Tether
abilities.description: Tethers itself to an allied unit.The link breaks when either the tethered-ally moves too far away, or Io cancels it.

abilities.name: Break Tether
abilities.description: Breaks the link to the tether-affected allied unit.

abilities.name: Spirits
abilities.description: Summon a number of particles that orbit around Io. If a particle collides with an enemy hero, it explodes and damages all enemy units within the radius.When its duration ends, all remaining particles explode.

abilities.name: Spirits In
abilities.description: Calls and attracts in all the particle-like spirits to the Fundamental.

abilities.name: Spirits Out
abilities.description: Sends and repulses out all the particle-like spirits from the Fundamental.

abilities.name: Overcharge
abilities.description: Grants self max health as bonus health regeneration, attack speed bonus, and outgoing spell damage amplification.

abilities.name: Relocate
abilities.description: Teleports Io to any location globally.Upon the duration expires, Io will return to the original ability cast location.

talents.left: x0.5 Tethered Ally Instant Attack Factor

talents.right: +0.2% Overcharge Max Health as Health Regen Bonus
